title: Anna McMorrin MP — Contact
text_excerpt: Anna McMorrin MP — Contact 0 Skip to Content Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Anna McMorrin MP Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Open Menu Close Menu Campaigns Contact Meet Me News Policy Contact Me Alternatively, you can click this link and enter your postcode in the box provided. If you are not a constituent of Cardiff North, you can use this to find your Member of Parliament and their contact details. If you are a constituent of Cardiff North, you can contact me by emailing: anna.mcmorrin.mp@parliament.uk or calling our constituency office: 02920 624 440 Please include your full name, home address and phone number so we can log your case in our system and get back to you as soon as possible. Due to strict parliamentary protocol, my office can only handle casework from constituents in Cardiff North. See if you are in Cardiff North by checking the list of areas below. Promoted by Anna McMorrin at 17 Plasnewydd, CF14 1NR.
